ground_truth.title: McCollister’s Fitness Equipment Repair
ground_truth.main_content:
McCollister’s expert technicians provide full-service fixes and repairs for your gym’s fitness equipment, including cardio and strength machines. We come to you for repairs at local gyms, studios, and residential and commercial gyms. With over 20 years of experience supporting fitness system transportation, installation, equipment repairs, and preventative maintenance, no fitness equipment is too complex for our specialist team.

Repairs for Local Commercial Gyms & Cycle Studios
Are you looking for nearby exercise equipment repair? Our services are convenient for local gyms and cycle studios. Trust our passionate and highly trained fitness machine technicians to handle your gym equipment carefully and get your equipment back up and functioning quickly.

Our full-service fitness equipment repairs can be utilized by commercial gyms, gyms housed within commercial office settings, and residential apartments and condominium community gyms. However, our services are not available for at-home gym fixes.

Gym Maintenance for Residential Buildings
At McCollister, we work with numerous exercise equipment brand types and have the technical knowledge and expertise to keep your fitness equipment clean and functional. Never leave customers or residents waiting to enjoy your gym again. Ensure your fitness machines consistently perform well with our professional services and preventative maintenance. Our services extend to HOAs, condo buildings, and common area gyms, but we do not service home gyms.

Equipment Repair for Corporate Gyms
Our equipment repair and maintenance services benefit corporate gyms, ensuring the safety of fitness equipment for employees and preventing unexpected repair costs. We provide full-service fixes for companies and leased buildings with corporate gyms.

Get your free quote today!
